personal_info.name: Nour Chargui
personal_info.title: Cybersecurity Engineering Student
personal_info.tagline: Aspiring Cybersecurity Engineer dedicated to building secure digital ecosystems and innovative AI-driven security solutions.

education.institution: TEK-UP Private Higher School of Technologies and Engineering
Higher Institute of Information and Communication Technologies (ISTIC)
education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering

details: Immersion in industry and electrical systems.
Development of a digital platform for ISET Radès (Vue.js/PHP) with real-time APIs.
Processed and recorded international financial transactions.
Assisted in reconciling and verifying accounting entries related to international money transfers.
Development of frontend components using Angular.
Collaborative frontend/backend team development using NodeJS and NextJS.

projects.title: Cyberguard IA
projects.description: Designed a cyber analysis platform under a FastAPI/React architecture, utilizing an autonomous AI agent and RAG engine to automate SOC alert triage with a privacy-first approach.

projects.title: CyberSentinel-Security-Platform
projects.description: Developed an auto-defensive e-commerce ecosystem. Integrated an intelligent algorithm that computes a user risk score to prevent financial fraud. Designed an admin dashboard featuring real-time log streaming and secure OTP-based account recovery using PHP, JS, MySQL, and Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: CyberSafe-Kids
projects.description: Created a gamified interactive platform teaching cybersecurity concepts. Built with a clean MVC architecture, an asynchronous network attack simulation engine, and an embedded AI assistant. Leveraged advanced JavaFX animations and JSON formats for dynamic educational content management.

projects.title: Log Security Monitor
projects.description: Designed a Linux system log analysis tool capable of detecting suspicious login attempts and anomalous activities within /var/log/auth.log files. Utilized Bash scripting and Linux utilities (grep, awk, sed) to automate analysis workflows.

projects.title: Linux Process Manager
projects.description: Developed a process manager in C for displaying, searching, and terminating Linux system processes via kernel system calls and /proc file system exploration.

projects.title: VehiScan
projects.description: Utilized computer vision techniques and deep learning models to detect vehicles, extract license plate data via OCR, and track movements across video sequences.
